      ☁ Cloud Sync

      Connected to your private Killjoy database. Data is read/written only through a secure, token-protected function — the public database API is closed. The project URL is pre-set below; you normally won't need to change anything here.

      Data

      This prototype stores data on this device. The data layer is isolated in one block in the code so it can be repointed at a cloud database later without rebuilding any screens.
